query: SELECT b.id, b.guestName, b.guestEmail, b.requestedDate, b.mealType, b.numberOfGuests, b.bookingStatus, b.paymentStatus, b.totalAmount, b.hostListingId, h.hostName FROM bookings b LEFT JOIN host_listings h ON b.hostListingId = h.id WHERE (b.guestName LIKE '%Ari%' OR b.guestEmail LIKE '%ari%') ORDER BY b.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT b.id, b.guestName, b.guestEmail, b.requestedDate, b.mealType, b.numberOfGuests, b.bookingStatus, b.paymentStatus, b.totalAmount, b.hostListingId, h.hostName FROM bookings b LEFT JOIN host_listings h ON b.hostListingId = h.id WHERE (b.guestName LIKE '%Ari%' OR b.guestEmail LIKE '%ari%') ORDER BY b.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
